# Phase 1 Gate 3 — Capability Lens Adversarial Test Suite
# File regenerated by: make test-capability-adversarial
Run at: 2026-06-29T09:27:25Z
Commit: 654da56

| #   | Attack Vector                      | Result   | Enforcement Layer                                              |
|-----|------------------------------------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1   | Direct KV write role escalation    | DEFENDED | Refractor reprojection cycle overwrites injected entry within NFR-P3 (Story 3.2a/b) |
| 2   | Projection lag window              | ACCEPTED-WINDOW | bounded; operational + Gateway enforcement (1.5.4)             |
| 3   | Lens-def mutation via AI actor     | DEFENDED | CapabilityAuthorizer NoCapabilityEntry (no cap KV entry for AI actor) + NFR-S10 no-special-case (Story 3.3 + 3.5) |
| 4   | Cross-target ephemeral grant bleed | DEFENDED | CapabilityAuthorizer ephemeralGrant target-match (§6.6): task+target must match exactly; cross-target → AuthContextMismatch (Story 3.2b + 3.3) |
| 5   | Stale projection resurrection (retry + adj-watch) | DEFENDED | Refractor monotonic projection-write guard: projectionSeq CAS rejects lower-seq replay; Delete → soft tombstone carries watermark; adj-watch (seq 0) cannot advance it (§6.2/§6.8; Story 12.1a) |
| 6   | Guarded-projection rebuild integrity | DEFENDED | Refractor force-truncate on a guarded rebuild: Truncate purges watermarks with the data → highest-seq replay wins (no rejected-write holes); the guard stays always-on across the rebuild so a concurrent/post-rebuild stale retry cannot resurrect the primary cap.identity doc (§6.2; Story 12.1b) |
| 7   | Cross-service access bleed         | DEFENDED | CapabilityAuthorizer matchServiceAccess (§6.5/§6.8): a cap.svc.<actor> grant authorizes only its projected service+allowedOperations; cross-service → AuthContextMismatch, op-not-allowed → AuthDenied, missing cap.svc → deny-by-absence (NoCapabilityEntry); the cap.svc plane is guarded against stale-replay resurrection by the Vector #5 projection-write guard (service-location SL.2) |
| 8   | Lane authorization bypass          | DEFENDED | CapabilityAuthorizer step-3 lane gate (§2.3): the platform path checks env.Lane ∈ doc.Lanes before the operationType matcher (service/task paths grant `default` only, pre-read reject); a default-only actor declaring a privileged lane (system/meta/urgent) → LaneUnauthorized; fail-closed on empty doc.Lanes (lane-authorization Fire 2) |

Phase 2 carry-forward:
  - Vector #1: NATS-account-level write restriction on Capability KV (Contract #6 §6.1)
    Phase 1 defense is Refractor reprojection; Phase 2 will add substrate-level enforcement.

PHASE 1 GATE 3: PASSED (8/8 cleared — 7 DEFENDED, 1 ACCEPTED-WINDOW)
EPIC 3 STATUS: CLOSED — 7 stories complete; Phase 1 Gate 3 cleared.
